title: Snowdust and Icemarine
description: This is a small mod made by me that makes ice more useful and a few more additives (requires fabric 0.15.11+)
body:
This mod adds a few uses of ice and a few other additions, The main addition is Icemarine a new resource that isn't like most, (at least how many I have seen). Instead, Icemarine is crafted using 4 pieces of ice blocks which results in 1 piece. Also, now this is a new block called icemarine block which no matter what biome you are in it will generate ice, (which is crafted by 9 pieces of Icemarine) which will be handy because it is also able to craft/smith armor and tools including a new bow (which the bow is only smithing table achievable), its name is HailStorm. It has more durability than a normal one. This mod is a big WIP including the ice shuriken which is some day going to act like a trident.




Enough of Icemarine talk now lets talk a bit of my styled Enderite, Enderite is crafted by Diamonds and an Ender pearl, Enderite tools are not crafted but is achievable by smithing table using an Eye Armor Trim. The enderite sword and bow have cool names, the "Ends Edge"(sword) and the "End's sight"(bow).




The next two things I will be talking of is Wedston and cooki'te (pronouced cookie-ite) Wedston is a combination or rather a alloy of Redstone dust and Gold ingots inwitch can be crafted into a scythe or into armor.



Cooki'te is a gemstone highly based off of moss agate (mossy agate) in witch looks like it has trees with'in it, and it is able to craft a intire tool set but no armor atm.
